title: blotiella mannii
side_effects: Blotiella mannii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Ingesting the plant can lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may also cause liver and kidney damage, as well as interact with certain medications. Improper use of Blotiella mannii can also result in headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some users.
